---
title: "Main Page"
---

<div class="hero">

<img src="images/profile.jpg">

<div class="hero-text">

# Welcome to My Personal Website

I am **Tarık Buğra Birinci**, a senior Industrial Engineering student at **Hacettepe University**.

This website presents my academic work, projects, and professional background.

Here you can explore my coursework, portfolio projects, and research interests.

</div>

</div>
